description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits WANT before MANIFEST or HEADS establishes accepted sync roots.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because the seed did not establish sync roots with MANIFEST or HEADS first.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the missing-head-context violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a missing-head-context negative interop case after HELLO has succeeded.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness injects WANT before MANIFEST or HEADS.
